case_title: JENNY LEI VS. GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF JENNY LEI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RYAN JOHNSON (BUILDING MANAGER) AND SHEILA ANGSTENBERGER (MANAGER). DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W1623301D004, TAG # 037211 BY DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RYAN JOHNSON, BUILDING MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY LEI, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LEI, JENNY GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SHEILA ANGSTENBERGER, MANAGER FOR LLC. FILED BY DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE CHARGED. SERVED JAN-10-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, JENNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC $570.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2023 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS-FILED COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPARTMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS LLC
